title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: Paraform, founded by 26-year-old John Kim, has paid out $50 million to human recruiters while other hiring platforms automate them away. The company has 10x'd revenue in 2025 by positioning humans rather than algorithms as the core value in hiring, working with customers like Palantir and Rippling.
